data.body: ddbe change 558 PS2: BOTH gates GREEN (LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1). ddbe is CI-proven and submittable. Will close ddbe ticket after current 4e9d v5 review finishes (avoid concurrent attested-git collision). 4e9d plan: v4 BLOCK(3)->v5 patched (cache key = os.path.realpath(repo_root or config.repo_root()) so None==explicit-path; scan_and_write_unlinks intermediate now threads attribution). Definitive composer map = 4 sites: append_event, txn.py(transition_core+claim_core), delete.py(scan_and_write_unlinks->_write_unlink,_write_event), compact.py(2 snapshot sites). v5 review running.
